question: Quand utiliser des effets de verre (backdrop-blur/glassmorphism) ?

principles.text: UNIQUEMENT pour overlays (modals, dropdowns, command palette). Blur 8-12px max. Semi-opaque bg (alpha >= 0.7) pour WCAG AA. Max 3-5 elements blur par viewport. prefers-reduced-transparency fallback obligatoire pour les utilisateurs sensibles.

sources.name: Apple HIG Materials/Vibrancy
sources.quote: Use materials to convey depth and hierarchy in overlays

sources.name: Axess Lab Glassmorphism Accessibility
sources.quote: Glassmorphism can cause readability issues without sufficient opacity

sources.name: Can I Use backdrop-filter — 92% support
sources.quote: Global support 92% including all modern browsers

sources.name: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.3 Contrast
sources.quote: Text over translucent backgrounds must still meet 4.5:1

sources.name: Josh Comeau — backdrop-filter
sources.quote: Performance cost of blur is real — limit to 3-5 elements
